global.title: Tesla promises FSD V14 Lite for HW3 cars internationally to appease growing tensions
global.summary: Tesla posted on X that it plans to expand FSD V14 Lite to HW3 vehicles in international markets — but only after the US rollout is complete and with no timeline attached. The vague commitment comes as HW3 owners across Europe and other international markets are in open revolt after Tesla launched FS

global.title: This US city is putting solar + batteries on 150 homes to cut bills
global.summary: Ann Arbor is about to test a new way to power homes — and it could become a model for other cities. Starting this week, energy management company FranklinWH will begin installing solar + battery storage in homes across Ann Arbor, Michigan, as part of a pilot run by the city’s Ann Arbor Sustainable E

global.title: Toyota’s new bZ electric SUV delivers more driving range than expected
global.summary: The new 2026 Toyota bZ has an EPA-estimated driving range of up to 314 miles, but real-world testing suggests it can go even further. more…

global.title: Walmart + ABB roll out 400 kW EV chargers – starting in Phoenix
global.summary: Walmart has partnered with ABB E-mobility to install its A400 All-in-One DC fast chargers at seven Walmart locations in the Phoenix area. The Arizona sites, along with stores in Colorado, Florida, and Georgia, are part of a broader US-wide Walmart-ABB launch. more…

global.title: Nio’s Onvo L80 undercuts Tesla Model Y in China with $36,000 starting price
global.summary: Nio’s budget sub-brand Onvo officially launched the L80, a five-seat electric SUV priced from 245,800 yuan (~$36,020), undercutting Tesla’s Model Y by 17,700 yuan (~$2,400) in China. The L80 opens pre-orders immediately, with first deliveries scheduled for May 15 — adding another aggressive competit

global.title: Volkswagen will unveil the first EV from its entry-level lineup tomorrow: What to expect
global.summary: The ID. Polo is set to kick off a new chapter at Volkswagen as the first model from its new family of entry-level EVs. more…

global.title: Heybike Mars 3.0 e-bike hits $1,199 low, Segway Navimow robotic lawn mower sale, Lectric refreshes Lightning e-bike deals, more
global.summary: Our Tuesday Green Deals are here, and headlining is Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale with up to $800 e-bike savings, which is giving folks a chance to score the Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike with a FREE pannier bag at its $1,199 low for the first time in 2026, among others models. global.title: Hyundai reveals stunning IONIQ 9 Black Ink Edition, and we got a first-hand look at it [Images]
global.summary: The 2027 Hyundai IONIQ 9 Calligraphy Performance Black Ink edition is more than just another blacked-out model, and we were invited to see it in person at Hyundai’s plant in Savannah, Georgia. more…

global.title: GM is still the #2 EV seller in the US, but for how long?
global.summary: GM beat first-quarter earnings expectations after winning a US Supreme Court decision to refund around $500 million from the Trump Administration’s tariffs. more…

global.title: The uncomfortable reality behind Rivian’s new ‘billion-dollar’ e-bike brand
global.summary: A billion-dollar valuation is a headline that’s hard to ignore. And when it’s attached to a new e-bike brand spun out of a company like Rivian, it’s even harder not to get swept up in the excitement. But zoom out for a moment, and a more complicated picture starts to emerge. more…
